nasb.text: Where now is your king That he may save you in all your cities, And your judges of whom you requested, “Give me a king and princes”?

esv.text: Where now is your king, to save you in all your cities? Where are all your rulers— those of whom you said, “Give me a king and princes”?

cnv.text: 現在你的王在哪裡？ 讓他拯救你吧！ 你所有的領袖在哪裡？讓他們治理你吧！ 因為論到他們你曾請求：‘把王和領袖賜給我。’

ccb.text: 你曾求我为你设立君王和首领， 现在拯救你的君王在哪里呢？ 在各城管理你的首领在哪里呢？
